changelog: **Inline Plan strip (renamed from Split).** The amber inline strip below the chat box is now '📋 Plan'. Clicking the Plan button APPENDS the `Plan ${N}` library prompt onto whatever you've already typed in the Lovable chat box — it no longer auto-submits. Review/edit, then press Send yourself.

**Expanded Plan presets.** Quick-pick buttons now go 5, 10, 12, 15, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 30, 32, 35, 38, 40, 42, 45, 48, 50, 52, 55, 58, 60, 70, 80, 100, 125, 150, 200. The five most-used picks (5, 10, 12, 15, 30) are highlighted with a stronger amber fill.
**Trimmed Next presets.** The purple `▶ Next` strip presets are now 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 10, 15 (5 and 10 highlighted). Manual input still accepts up to 200.
Back-compat: legacy `triggerSplitFromInline` export retained; new `triggerPlanPasteFromInline` powers the paste-only flow.
